title: Mod manifest
description: Declares a mod: identity, dependencies, what it provides, and (optionally) where a new game starts. Directory names under the mod map 1:1 to `provides` keys.

framework_version.description: The framework contract revision this mod is authored against. Omitted means current. The loader migrates or refuses old revisions explicitly — never silently.

dependencies.description: Mod ids that must load before this mod. Cycles are rejected at load time.

provides.description: Kind -> list of entity ids this mod ships. Kinds are open-ended; the engine iterates what it finds. Known kinds: factions, locations, ships, npcs, storylines, economy_tables.

start.description: Where a new game begins. This is how content tells the engine what to boot into — the engine never hardcodes an entity id. Last-loaded mod that defines `start` wins.

extra.description: Free-form escape hatch for mod-specific data. Never read by the engine.
